creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
knu         2010-03-22 12:15:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    lang/gauche          Makefile 
  Log:
  Fix build with ccache by adding CCACHE_CPP2=1 to MAKE_ENV, which
  disables the problematic pre-processor optimization of ccache.
  
  PR:             ports/144125
  Submitted by:   myself
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.54      +2 -0      ports/lang/gauche/Makefile
